//: Dev-only defaults so local runs (VS / dotnet run, no Docker) connect and seed the super admin. Docker Compose env vars override these.
//sid: Saarvix overloads `sid` as the user's legacy Mongo ObjectId (token contract). Move Authly's OIDC session-binding claim off `sid` so it stops clobbering the pre-token hook's user-id sid. Unset = OIDC-standard `sid`.
